title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed, with focus on mathematical foundations rather than the latest tools, creates durable skills that outlast hype cycles. He contends that AI cannot change people, but people can change AI when grounded in deep understanding.
